name: Blondies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Prepare a 13x9 inch pan for baking.
3. Beat together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add in the eggs and vanilla, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the flour, baking powder, and salt until combined.
6. Fold in the chopped pecans and coconut.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 35 minutes.
9. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into bars.
